channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Despite Their Successes, Some Mobile Crisis Response Teams Are in Crisis
item.description: Mobile crisis units are trained to respond to emergency calls when people are experiencing delusions or hallucinations. But unlike police departments,...

item.title: This Zodiac Sign Is Most Likely To Be Power Hungry—Is It Yours?
item.description: They're controlling.

item.title: Lawmakers, Health Groups Resist Their States’ Rural Health Fund Plans
item.description: Some Republican state lawmakers and state health associations are pushing back against spending plans under the Trump administration’s $50 billion fed...

item.title: Should Your Muscles Shake During A Workout? A Trainer Weighs In
item.description: Here's how to tell if it's healthy or harmful

item.title: Large Meta-Analysis Says This Daily Habit Can Decrease Anxiety & Depression
item.description: It can decrease anxiety and depression.

item.title: Want A Better Immune System? Eat A Small Serving Of This Daily
item.description: It's also good for gut health.

item.title: This Spice Can Help Soothe Indigestion (No, Not Ginger)
item.description: But should you actually take it?

item.title: Why Obesity Care Week Matters for Black Women
item.description: From March 2nd-6th, the Obesity Action Coalition (OAC) is highlighting the importance of Obesity Care Week. World Obesity Day is also on March 4th. Th...

item.title: Even Patients Are Shocked by the Prices Their Insurers Will Pay — And It Costs All of Us
item.description: Health care prices are on the rise, and patients are flummoxed that even insurance companies aren’t doing more to control costs.

item.title: Kerry Washington Gets Candid About Her Eating Disorder
item.description: Disordered eating impacts thousands of individuals, including actress Kerry Washington. The Scandal star and author shared details about how she copes...

item.title: Hasta los pacientes se sorprenden por los precios que sus aseguradoras están dispuestas a pagar, un costo que al final pagamos todos
item.description: La inflación médica ha superado de manera constante la inflación general durante años, y las facturas de muchos procedimientos breves y de rutina lleg...

item.title: Oren Nissim, Brook-ai – Figuring out RPM
item.description: Oren Nissim is the CEO of Brook-ai which is making some waves in the remote care space. Their goals is to use remote patient monitoring to help provid...

item.title: Listen to the Latest ‘KFF Health News Minute’
item.description: The "KFF Health News Minute” brings original health care and health policy reporting from our newsroom to the airwaves each week.

item.title: Lupito Nyong’o’s Fibroids Have Returned, She Now Has 50
item.description: Last summer, Academy Award-winning actress Lupita Nyong’o revealed that she had 30 fibroids removed via myomectomy not long after winning her Oscar in...

item.title: ‘Real Housewives of Salt Lake City Star’ Mary M. Cosby’s Son Robert Cosby Jr. Dead At 23

item.title: Breaking Down Graves' Disease Treatment Options

item.title: Human Braiding Hair May Be a Health Hazard Too
item.description: If you think switching to human hair for your protective styles is safer for your hair and health, think again. Consumer Reports followed up on the te...

item.title: Can We Ride the GenAI Wave Without Getting Subsumed by It?
item.description: By DAVID SHAYWITZ “There are decades where nothing happens; and there are weeks where decades happen,” said Lenin, probably never. It’s also a remarka...
